overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring the distinctive yellow geometric architecture of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The player walks from an open street through covered walkways, crosses a busy intersection at Ferguson and Drake Ave, and continues through neon-lit urban canyons with heavy vehicle traffic and dense commercial signage.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the yellow geometric ramp structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street toward the distinctive yellow architectural structure

entered.detail: distinctive angular yellow building with ramp-like architecture
gray concrete wall with red and blue graffiti art
tall futuristic glass skyscraper visible in the distance
covered walkway beneath the angular yellow structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a multi-lane futuristic city street with the camera walking toward a distinctive yellow geometric building. The environment features clean asphalt, overhead cables, and distant glass towers. The camera passes under the yellow ramp structure, transitioning from open sky to a partially covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with steam vents approaching major intersection

events.description: steam rises from ground vents on the right side of the sidewalk
approaching the Ferguson street intersection with overhead signage visible

agents.ego_description: walking on the sidewalk past steam vents while approaching the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead street sign displaying 'Ferguson' in white text on dark background
ground-level vent emitting white steam onto the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the yellow underpass, the scene opens onto a sidewalk with visible steam vents and moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera approaches the Ferguson intersection, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Overhead signage and elevated walkways become visible as the urban density increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk at Ferguson and Drake Ave

events.description: crossing the multi-lane intersection with a group of pedestrians
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main avenue

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection at Ferguson and Drake Ave amidst dense pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction
futuristic sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: overhead street sign displaying 'Drake Ave' with directional arrows
large curved highway ramp structure with teal accents
building facade with illuminated 'WNS' corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection at Ferguson and Drake Ave, surrounded by dense crowds of pedestrians. Futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic lights while the camera navigates the crosswalk. The scene features prominent overhead signage and the curved elevated highway ramp becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial avenue with heavy traffic and neon billboards

events.description: navigating past moving traffic while walking along the sidewalk
entering area with denser overhead structures and narrower street canyon

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy avenue sidewalk past commercial buildings and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket and white helmet walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large teal-colored elevated highway passing over the street
tall illuminated advertisement with pink and white graphics
enclosed pedestrian walkway bridge spanning the street
building feature with green neon circular lighting elements

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main commercial avenue with dense vehicle traffic flowing past. The environment features prominent neon billboards, the WNS building, and massive overhead highway structures. The street gradually narrows as the camera approaches the urban canyon section with elevated pedestrian bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with overhead walkways and dense neon signage

events.description: entering deeper shadow as the street narrows and overhead structures block more light

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the narrow street canyon surrounded by towering buildings and hanging cables

entered.detail: dark opening to a narrow alleyway between tall buildings
ground-level shop fronts with bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow urban canyon with densely packed buildings and extensive overhead pedestrian walkways. The neon circular building feature moves closer on the left while the street ahead narrows into a darker alley. The environment is heavily shaded with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene, and the sidewalk is lined with small storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open futuristic boulevard into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched depths of a dense urban canyon. It begins on a multi-lane street, moving toward a distinctive yellow geometric building and passing beneath its ramp structure to transition from the open sky into a partially covered walkway. As the camera exits the underpass, the environment becomes more crowded with steam vents and pedestrians, leading directly into the wide, bustling intersection of Ferguson and Drake Ave where futuristic vehicles and dense crowds fill the crosswalk. The scene then expands along a commercial avenue dominated by neon billboards and massive overhead highway structures before the street gradually narrows. Finally, the camera enters a shaded urban canyon where artificial neon lighting takes over, passing a circular building on the left as the path tightens into a dark, storefront-lined alley.
